## Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed the relevant architecture and development standards.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated public documentation and example configuration where needed.
- [ ] Frontend changes pass type checking and i18n checks.
- [ ] I did not add credentials, private endpoints, personal data, generated output, or local `.env` files.
- [ ] I documented experimental behavior and known limitations accurately.
